examples: You could also partner with a local bakeshop or deli and include bread or meat in the basket.
The two owners of the bakeshop also have an Amsterdam bed-and-breakfast, Cake Under My Pillow.
They passed the bakeshop, but Cosette did not think of the bread which she had been ordered to fetch.
And then there is Sour Flour, a community-focused bakeshop in the Mission District.
